subcodes.first_line: This is a Book which the Wronged One hath revealed unto one from among His handmaidens, a leaf from among His leaves, that the breezes of revelation may attract her and draw her nigh unto God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب انزله المظلوم لامه من امائه و ورقه من اوراقه لتجذبها نفحات الوحی و تقربها الی الله
